evidence.description: Hashemi leaked details of Iran's secret arms dealings with the U.S., including McFarlane's May 1986 Tehran visit, to the Lebanese magazine Ash-Shiraa, whose publication on 3 November 1986 triggered the scandal.

evidence.source_title: Importing Arms, Exporting The Revolution: Mehdi Hashemi And His Fatal Leak To Ash-Shiraa — Yale Review of International Studies
evidence.description: Hashemi's ideological opposition to the arms deals and his role in exposing them to the Lebanese press.

editorial_notes: Hashemi leaked the affair. Arrested October 1986, executed September 1987.
